signals.headline: Kevin Warsh Fed Chair Nomination | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Kevin Warsh Fed Chair Nomination | YES | HIGH confidence**
Trump announced Kevin Warsh as his nominee for Federal Reserve chair, with expected Senate confirmation and assumption of role by mid-May 2026.[1][3]

Potential Rate Hike Under Warsh | YES | MED confidence**
One of Warsh's first acts as Fed chair could involve presiding over an interest rate hike, particularly given current inflationary pressures with core annual inflation at 3.9% and oil prices surging above $100 per barrel amid Middle East conflict.[1]
